title: Miracle-Gro Moisture Control Water Storing Gel for Pots & Baskets, 200g
description: From the manufacturer Previous page For indoor and outdoor use Saves time and watering Absorbs and holds up to 150 times of its own weight in excess water, saving time and watering. Works all season long Works all season long. It’s ideal for pots, tubs, hanging baskets, window boxes, and flower beds. Next page 1 For Indoor & Outdoor Use 2 Saves Time & Watering 3 Works All Season Long Releases water as and when your plants need it Miracle-Gro Moisture Control Water Storing Gel Pots & Baskets contains water-storing crystals that absorb and release water when plants need it, reducing the need for watering. Simply mix the crystals into compost. Works all season. Ideal for pots, tubs and hanging baskets, helps save time and reduces watering frequency throughout the season. Comes in a resealable pouch. Bag made from 50% recycled materials. Why should I use Miracle-Gro Moisture Control Water Storing Gel Pots & Baskets? Increases the water-holding capacity of composts. Saves time and reduces watering frequency throughout the season. 1 bag treats 40 small pots, containers or baskets. Where can I use Miracle-Gro Moisture Control Water Storing Gel Pots & Baskets? Ideal for all plants indoor and outdoor. Use on ornamental plants in flower beds and borders, pots, tubs and hanging baskets, helps save time and reduces watering frequency throughout the season. When should I use Miracle-Gro Moisture Control Water Storing Gel Pots & Baskets? Use Miracle-Gro Moisture Control Water Storing Gel Pots & Baskets from March to September, when plants are actively growing. Works all season long. How do I use Miracle-Gro Moisture Control Water Storing Gel Pots & Baskets? Simply mix into compost. 1 bag treats 15-20 average size (30cm) containers or baskets. Use 1-2 teaspoons for every 10 litres of compost. Reseal after use. Harmful if swallowed, wash hands after use. product_details_tab_data.Title: Miracle-Gro Moisture Control Water Storing Gel for Pots & Baskets, 200g
product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Keep out of reach of children and pets. Avoid contact with skin and eyes. Do not ingest. Store in a cool, dry place away from heat sources and open flames. Always follow the instructions on the package.
